items.title: Swipe / match / undo core loop
items.summary: Two partners swipe names like/pass; mutual likes become matches. Free undo on the last swipe. The product's core loop.

items.title: AI generate & suggest names
items.summary: Anthropic (claude-haiku-4-5) generates and suggests names, batch-enriched at creation, behind a per-user daily rate limit.

items.title: Gender-split tournament league tables
items.summary: League table (group stage) ranking mutual matches via head-to-head votes, split into boys/girls leagues. The collaborative-ranking moat.

items.title: Tournament hub (league → matches)
items.summary: Phase 1: turned the league table into a tournament hub with head-to-head duel pairing and progress tracking.

items.title: World Cup knockout bracket finale
items.summary: Phase 2: top league names seed a single-elimination bracket; ties decided together to crown a favourite.

items.title: Shared origin-culture filter
items.summary: Shared house-rules filter excluding origin-culture groups (12 groups) from the swipe deck, stored in app_state.

items.title: UK ONS import → 17.7k catalog
items.summary: UK ONS xlsx importer scaled the global catalog to ~17,713 names with origin/meaning/rank enrichment.

items.title: AI cost & reliability optimisation
items.summary: Per-user daily AI rate limit; enrichment caches only on API success (no negative-cache-on-error blanking).

items.title: Web push match notifications
items.summary: web-push match notifications + a stale-deck reminder cron.

items.title: Rank tab in bottom navigation
items.summary: Added the Rank tab to the bottom navigation to surface the tournament.

items.title: Multi-couple tenancy refactor (Phase A)
items.summary: Replace the user_slug enum with couples + members; scope all per-person/per-couple data to a couple; backfill Karo & Lucy as the seed couple with no data loss. Expand → migrate → contract. Prerequisite for native. On branch tenancy-phase-a.

items.title: Phase B — session auth + multi-couple frontend
items.summary: Signed session cookie carrying member_id (replaces x-user-slug + legacy_slug bridge); create/join-couple flows with invite codes; generalise the frontend off hard-coded karo/lucy.

items.title: Expo native scaffold (monorepo apps/web + apps/mobile)
items.blocker: Depends on Phase A (tenancy) + Phase B (auth).
items.summary: React Native / Expo client over the existing Next.js API, in a monorepo (apps/web + apps/mobile) sharing types/API client. Cross-platform parity + bulletproof sync are first-class.

items.title: Phase C — onboarding + popularity cut + curated pool
items.summary: First-run onboarding that shapes the pool (gender focus, origins, popularity/volume cut) with a skip-everything default to a curated starter pool. New filter primitive: popularity cut.

items.title: Phase D — paywall / plans (per-couple)
items.summary: Free tier (swipe/match/league, capped AI) + paid unlock (unlimited AI, knockout, advanced filters), billed per couple via a couple-level flag.

items.title: Native push (APNs / FCM)
items.summary: Real native push on both platforms (APNs + FCM) for match notifications, replacing web-push for native clients.

items.title: Competitor gap: search names
items.summary: Let users search the catalog for a specific name — a common competitor feature we lack. Add to prod only if it clearly improves the model.

items.title: Competitor gap: add-your-own-name
items.summary: Allow a user to add a name not in the catalog (batched enrich at creation).

items.title: Competitor gap: delete-a-match
items.summary: Let a couple remove a match they no longer want in contention.

items.title: Competitor gap: pronunciation
items.summary: Show pronunciation for names — a frequently requested competitor feature.

items.title: Phase A contract — drop user_slug / app_state
items.blocker: Gated: run only after the member_id deploy is confirmed stable in prod. Keeps user_slug as a rollback path until then.
items.summary: Destructive cleanup after the member_id switch: drop user_slug + app_state, member_id NOT NULL, contract indexes/enum. Idempotent DDL (snapshots stale). Recoverable via backup but irreversible in place.

items.title: Variant grouping — auto-pass all spellings of a rejected name
items.summary: Reject a name -> hide all its spellings. Phase 1 (Live): dmetaphone + lev<=2 pass-only. Phase 2 (Building): curated names.variant_group key via db:cluster-variants (dmetaphone buckets + Claude partition), used by deck filter, variants endpoint, and new-name creation with heuristic fallback.

items.title: Tenancy correctness landmines (knockout index + new-couple profile)
items.summary: Roadmap audit fix (PR #15): knockout unique index -> (couple_id,gender); new-couple profile crash fixed (user_slug PK relaxed, member_id is the key, routes null-safe). DDL applied to prod + schema.ts reconciled.

items.title: Observability + config-hardening floor (Sentry, error pages, secrets, cron, headers)
items.blocker: Remaining: install @sentry/nextjs (needs a Sentry DSN); set AUTH_SECRET + CRON_SECRET in Vercel (cron reminders paused until CRON_SECRET set).
items.summary: Tier 1.5 floor BEFORE tenancy/auth refactors: set AUTH_SECRET+CRON_SECRET fail-closed; require cron Bearer; @sentry/nextjs + error/global-error/not-found pages + ErrorBoundary; security headers in next.config.ts.

items.title: Defensive launch batch — domains + store names + TM + prod secrets
items.summary: Tier 0 (mostly Karo action): buy lullaname.com/.app; reserve App Store + Play names; file TM ITU (class 9+42); set AUTH_SECRET+CRON_SECRET in Vercel. Irreversible if the name leaks.

items.title: PostHog product analytics instrumentation
items.summary: Tier 3: PostHog connected but app emits no events. Instrument partner_joined, swipe+deck_exhausted (churn), champion_crowned (north-star/review), ai_rate_limited; id by member_id, group by couple_id. Before day-1 store traffic.

items.title: Apply Lullaname brand across the app
items.summary: Tier 3: still Names Match amber. Apply locked Lullaname identity (Quote & Dot icon, cream/terracotta/butter, soft-serif wordmark). Gate after domain purchase.

items.title: Surface 'decided together' + shareable champion card
items.summary: Tier 4 moat: per-pair consensus + settle-disagreements filter + partner-pick reveal; We-chose share card via vercel-og at champion; members.last_seen_at presence primitive.

items.title: Perf/UX quick-wins: one /detail request per card + exit fix + pool + cleanup
items.summary: Roadmap perf/UX wins (PR #16): /detail consolidates 3 per-card GETs into 1; swipe exit animation flies the correct way on taps; prod DB pool memoized; dead /api/tournament/results deleted (standings dedup).
